creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am importing llvm, clang, compiler-rt, libc++, libunwind, lld, lldb, and openmp 14.0.0 into <https://github.com/DimitryAndric/freebsd-src/tree/llvm-14-update>, which is a fork of <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src>.

Please perform an exp-run against this branch. To retrieve it, use:

git clone -b llvm-14-update https://github.com/DimitryAndric/freebsd-src.git

As of 2022-02-06, this branch contains the equivalent of llvm-project's 14.0.0 ~rc1, and it has been rebased onto main-n252975-b2dfb50f3f38.
